title: GTConsolidate
description: A little multiblock parallelization for GTCEu
body:
Isn't finding space to meet the demand for Europium a bit of a hassle? And doesn't the Vacuum Freezer feel a bit slow?
**GTConsolidate** adds parallel versions of those multiblock machines (_though they’re a bit quirky... :P_).   ### Contents __Advanced Fusion Reactor__: Parallelized up to **16**. __Advanced Electric Blast Furnace__: Parallelized up to **4 or 16**. __Advanced Vacuum Freezer__: Parallelized up to **4 or 16**. __Advanced Assembly Line__: Parallelized up to **4, 16 or 64**.
